VectorFromComponents.decision: When constructing Vector4 from a Vector3, use explicit component extraction: new Vector4([v[0], v[1], v[2], w]) — the Vector4 constructor does not accept Vector3 (IBaseVector<3>) directly.

curvesplineDataRef.decision: STRUCT-serialized DataRef fields typed as 'T | DataRef<T> | undefined'. In dataLink(), cast to 'unknown as number' when passing to getblock_addUser to satisfy the overloaded type. After deserialization, check 'instanceof DataRef' to guard against unresolved refs.

TransDataElemGeneric.decision: TransDataElem<D1, D2> is generic over its data1/data2 slot types. D1 is the element (e.g. Vertex, SceneObject), D2 is the stored transform data (e.g. Vector3, ObjectTransform). TransDataList<D1, D2> follows the same pattern. TransformData uses the default <undefined, undefined> parameterization for heterogeneous storage. Subclasses specify concrete types when creating elements.

ITransDataTypeInterface.decision: TransDataType implementations use ITransDataType<D1, D2, TransElem, UndoData> interface as object literals rather than class inheritance. MeshTransType implements ITransDataType<Vertex, Vector3, MeshTransVert, MeshUndoData>. ObjectTransType implements ITransDataType<SceneObject, ObjectTransform, ...>. TransDataType class remains as a helper with static utilities (calcPropCurve, register, buildTypesProp).

scripts/camera/camera.ts.notes: Pass 1 had 4 errors: .ts extension import (fixed to .js), plain tuple not assignable to Vector3Like (fixed to new Vector3([...])), Vector3 not assignable to Vector4 constructor (fixed to explicit component extraction), unused variable 'l' (removed). Fixed logic bug: LayerTypes.LOC || LayerTypes.ID was short-circuited OR (always LOC); changed to bitwise | for correct flag union.

scripts/editors/view3d/selectmode.ts.notes: Pure constants file. Added declare global for window._SelMask.

scripts/editors/view3d/view3d_base.ts.notes: Pure constants file, no changes needed.

human_edits.resolution: User chose generic approach: TransDataElem<D1, D2> with definite assignment assertions

human_edits.reason: User refactored to ITransDataType interface, extracted from class to object literal pattern
human_edits.resolution: ITransDataType<D1, D2, TransElem, UndoData> interface; TransDataType kept as utility class

scripts/editors/view3d/transform/transfo.notes: Added TransformDefine interface. Made TransDataElem and TransDataList generic. Replaced deprecated util.set with Set<string>. Added ITransDataType interface. TransDataList constructor now takes ITransDataType.

scripts/editors/view3d/findnearest/all.t.notes: Pure re-export aggregator, no changes needed.

scripts/editors/view3d/transform/all.ts.notes: Pure re-export aggregator, no changes needed.

scripts/editors/view3d/transform/transfo.notes: Added TransCenterResult interface (exported). Typed all function params with ToolContext, number, etc.

human_edits.reason: User refactored MeshTransType from class to object literal implementing ITransDataType
human_edits.resolution: Created MeshTransList, MeshTransVert subclasses. MeshTransType as const object literal.

scripts/editors/view3d/transform/transfo.notes: Major refactor: MeshTransType and ObjectTransType converted to ITransDataType object literals. Added MeshTransList, MeshTransVert, MeshUndoData, ObjectUndoData types. ObjectTransform class fully typed. RingStack interface for proportional editing stack.

scripts/editors/view3d/view3d_draw.ts.notes: Added local type aliases (MeshCache, ChunkedMesh, DrawPrimitive, Uniforms, ShaderProgram). Dead code methods gutted. Fixed .ts import extension.

scripts/editors/view3d/findnearest/findn.notes: Fixed ...arguments spreads with explicit params. Fixed cam.position to cam.pos. Vector3-to-Vector4 casts via as unknown as IVectorOrHigher<4>. Element type narrowing.
Typed all static methods. Removed dead threeCamera code. Cast ctx.datalib.get() as SceneObject.

scripts/editors/view3d/transform/transfo.notes: TransformOp made generic. NumericVal interface. TransformOpInputs type. Subclasses: TranslateOp, ScaleOp, RotateOp, InflateOp, ToSphereOp. MeshTransVert casts for mesh-specific fields. Vector2-to-Vector3 fixed with .load2().

scripts/editors/view3d/view3d_ops.ts.notes: Field declarations for CenterViewOp, OrbitTool, TouchViewTool, PanTool, ZoomTool, TouchData. Event handler types. castViewRay array return fix. modalEnd(false) boolean required.

scripts/editors/view3d/view3d_select.ts.notes: GPUSelectBuffer field declarations. FindnearestWithStaticDrawIDs intersection type. Fixed ...arguments spread in sampleBlock_intern.

scripts/editors/view3d/transform/transfo.notes: Region class typed with Set<Face/Vertex/Edge> and Map<Vertex, Vector3>. InsetTransformOp field declarations. Renamed this.first to this._first. Fixed Vertex-as-Vector3 bugs (v.co.load instead of v.load).

scripts/editors/view3d/widgets/widget_ut.notes: Already clean after rename, no changes needed.

scripts/editors/view3d/widgets/widget_to.notes: Fixed import extension. Added field declarations for all widget classes. Fixed update() signatures to match base (no params). Renamed onclick methods to _handleClick to avoid property/method conflict. Wrapped array colors in new Vector4(). Added return true to on_mousedown lambdas. Removed dead code after early returns. Widened widgets.ts factory signatures for Matrix4|undefined and Vector4|string.
